entry.title: SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025 Event Information
entry.content:
SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025 event announcement in Japanese.

※登壇者募集中
※参加者募集は、12月中旬以降を予定しています

SAP TechEd 、TechEd Japan 、SAP Inside Track Tokyo の季節となりました！
SAP Inside Track はSAP関連トピックを共有し合う、草の根コミュニティイベントです。

イベント名： SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025
テーマ　　： Connect Together, Better Together ～ ともに繋がり、ともに良くなる
言語　　　： 日本語
開催形式　： ハイブリット開催
開催期間　： 2025年2月28日(金)、3月14日(金)、3月19日(水)　※全3回
開催時間　： 19:00～22:00予定
参加費　　： 無料

SAP Community に登録すればどなたでも参加できます！
学生、フリーランス、ユーザ企業、パートナー企業、JSUG会員、SAP社員など自由参加です。
※まだコミュニティメンバーでない方はこちら

イベントのねらい

SAP TechEdやSAP TechEd Japanで学んだこと、プロジェクトで経験したことをコミュニティで共有することで、みんなで学びあいませんか？
アウトプットがあなたの活動の幅を広げます！

参加申し込み

 

セッション概要

ハッシュタグ　：#sitTokyo
運営　　　　　：chillSAP　※SAP社のイベントではなくコミュニティのカジュアルイベントです
スポンサー　　：未定
関連イベント　：SAP TechEd 2024、SAP TechEd Japan 2024

 

SAP Inside Track Tokyo 2025 セッション情報

1. セッション内容

  • 持ち時間15分のプレゼン、デモ、考察
  • 元ネタは SAP TechEd 2024 、 SAP TechEd Japan 2024 で学んだこと、プロジェクトで経験したこと
  • TechEd のトピック考察、私はこう思う
  • TechEd に参加して深堀りしてみた（SAP TechEd on Tourに参加された方もオンラインで参加された方も是非！）
  • TechEd のトピック試してみた、ハンズオンやってみた
  • プロジェクトで経験して、こう使うといい、ここが要改善など

 

2. スケジュールとトラックのトピックス

Day

日程

トラック

トピック

動画

Day 12025年2月28日(金)Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP (DT)未定 
  Artificial Intelligence (AI)未定 
Day 22025年3月14日(金)Application Development and Automation (AD)未定 
  Integration (IN)未定 
Day 32025年3月19日(水)Data and Analytics (DA)未定 

 

3. 登壇者＆発表コンテンツ

※発表コンテンツは随時更新中です！

2/28 Day 1「Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP (DT) & Artificial Intelligence (AI)」

NameTitle
PhotoOverview

3/14 Day 2「Application Development and Automation (AD) & Integration (IN)」

NameTitle
PhotoOverview

3/19 Day 3「Data and Analytics (DA)」

NameTitle
PhotoOverview

 

SAP コミュニティバッジの申請方法

SAP Inside Track Tokyoを視聴された方はこちらから申請いただくとご自身のコミュニティIDにバッジが付与されます。せっかくの機会ですので是非ご申請ください。
※SAPコミュニティバッジの申請にはSAPコミュニティにアカウント登録が必要です。
　お持ちでない場合は無料で作成できますのでご登録ください。

Step 1

ご自身が参加予定の回のリンクをクリックしてください
※過去の回には申し込みできませんのでご注意ください
Day 1 
Day 2
Day 3

Step 2

右側にある「あなたは参加しますか？」の質問に対し、「はい」のボタンをクリックしてください

Step 3

「はい」のボタンの下の「参加する」のところにご自身のアイコンが表示されたことをご確認ください

entry.title: Re: Item Master Data
entry.content:
Hi,

May be you can give a try to the DTW if there is a possibility to update the Items already added.

Kr,

Jitin

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content: SAP Ariba Category Management is a winner of the 2024 Top Software & Tech award in the Procurement/ERP Software category from Supply & Demand Chain Executive! The Top Software & Tech awards spotlight new-to-market and existing software enhancements designed to provide automation, efficiency, and visibility to the supply chain space.

entry.title: Re: WT for flat-rate SV-contributions for Employer DE
entry.content:
Will that WT be transfered to FI as an expense or will it only be used as an "Information WT" ?

Does such an Information WT already exist in your system so that you could copy it? 

Will the WT in IT0015 be a "trigger" for the calculation (that will be based on an other WT) or will it hold the amount on which to calculate the SV- contribution?

Execute Payroll Simulation for one employee, with the "Display Log" box checked, and drill down into that log to find where the WT on which you want to base the SV- contribution exists with it's Amount.  That would be a good place to insert a PCR to calculate your Information WT (using a Custom SV-Contribution Constant in V_T511K that holds the value of 21.00).

Test and test, and for the payslip, don't configure your new WT in the Remuneration Statement if that's what you use, and if not, use table view V_512W_O to identify the differences between your new WT and one that does not appear on your payslip, in the section at the bottom of the screen (from V_512W_D if I remember correctly).

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
hi @raymond_giuseppi 
sorry but I don't understand your proposed solution.

This would be the code to use? But I don't have to call a page, I need to create a password type field in the table and when I enter SE16 I need to display **** and not the clear value

entry.content:
Week 2 - Started
Github repo for AoC 2024
https://github.com/yogananda-muthaiah/adventofcode2024

happy coding and keep enjoying UI5 front-end development

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
Okay, I had the same kind of weird issues with just a simple SELECT LABST FROM CDS1 which gave a wrong result (without even joining to CDS2). ABAP 7.58.

Probably that using replaced objects like MARD (it has a replacement object named NSDM_E_MARD) may lead to many possible errors. Use the replacement object and I guess it will solve.

I don't know any way to check inconsistencies.

Replacement Objects - ABAP Keyword Documentation

  • When you define a replacement object for a database table for a classic database view, the system checks whether the specified CDS view fulfills the prerequisites. If a CDS view used as a replacement object is changed later on in such a way that the prerequisites are no longer fulfilled, a runtime error DBSQL_REDIRECT_INCONSISTENCY occurs when an Open SQL read is performed on the database table or on the database view.

  • You should be extremely careful when specifying a proxy object for a database table or a database view. Incorrect usage can cause inconsistencies.

LABST is no more stored in MARD, it can be accessed correctly via NSDM_E_MARD: 3450094 - CDC is not working if the calculated field is changed - SAP for Me.

When reading MARD, the replacement object should be automatically used, but it seems it's not... (maybe some bugs here)

entry.title: Re: Part 8: Debugging your solution
entry.content:
how to debug in SAP cloud application studio using the communication inbound user?

I am defining the user that processes incoming communications but the debugging does not start.

Another question: when logging into my environment I have two solutions, one is registered as Deployed and the other as Assembled. In which one should I set the breakpoint?

entry.title: Re: Join tables vbak and konv
entry.content: Please go to SE11 and tell us if KONV is a cluster table or not. Thank you.

entry.title: Failed to get database information from System Landscape Directory
entry.content:
I have just installed SAP HANA (with the demo Database SBODEMOUS checked) and SAP B1 Server side at SUSE successfully. Then I installed SAP B1 Client side at Windows and it finished successfully too. But when I tried to login in SAP B1 Client with user/password manager/manager, selected the SBODEMOUS database, it shows "Failed to get database information from System Landscape Directory". But when I login the SLD, it does show the demo database.

I got client log and it shows: 

"Biz SLDClient SLDClientOP::GetCommonDBCredentials SLD Client Exception code:7 message:function return is empty : GetCommonDBCredential # # TID=11388 sldclient.cpp 1150 Customized=0".

I have tried to reinstall the SAP B1 Client but it doesn't help. And I also tried to remove and readd the DB Instance at SLD ControlCenter but it still doesn't help. Tried to restart server and client computer and result is the same.

I also follow other notes has the same topic but it doesn't make any change.

Is there any other things I need to inspect or try. Please give me some advice.

Thanks.

entry.title: Unable to delete Quantity Conversion in Product Master Data
entry.content:
Error occurs while trying to update the quantity conversion in the product master data.
Error: 'Changing the conversion not possible; it is used by one or more open customer invoices, items to be invoiced, procurement price lists, purchase orders, purchase requests, sales orders, source documents, source documents for supplier invoices, supplier invoices and supplier credit memos'

Is it possible to change/delete the quantity conversion?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to delete Quantity Conversion in Product Maste...
entry.content:
The relevant material or service is already used in one or more documents. The reason for this error is that the business documents which are using this material would end up in inconsistency if the change is allowed. The veto check executed is not at quantity conversion level, but rather at material/service level. If that material/service is being used in a document, even if the quantity conversion used is one other than the one you intend to delete or change, the system will still block the action.

Since the quantity conversions are already used in business documents, system will not allow the changes at master data level. Changes to the quantity conversion directly in the backend are also not supported by SAP. As a workaround, SAP advises to create a new material with the same details as the existing one, maintaining the correct quantity conversions, then blocking the previous material/service for further use.

entry.title: Re: Can Employee Central be configured to show all info e...
entry.content: Thanks for the advise, works as you said in old solution. But not when we turned on Latest Profile Profile. Thanks that you took the time 🙂

entry.title: Re: Structure list for equipment in PM Order with several...
entry.content: In the meantime I found a note on the SAP Support Portal that provided me with a solution for my issue with the structure list. It will take some development but it will solve my issue: https://me.sap.com/notes/3465556

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @Thibault_dockx,

in my demo case I only have 53k records with 2 medified records. And the runtime was 3 seconds. But in one of my customer we had 1 Billion records on SAP HANA Native On Premise and I used Flowgraph to do the same with HASH and MD5 function. And it worked well, since this HASH and MD5 functions create 32 string long and to compare 32 chars is much faster then to compare each fields in a row. The flowgraph was crashed if I compare each field with memory alllocation error.

Best regards

Wanda Soetomo

entry.title: Re: Reverse UD of Material having Serial number profile
entry.content: Hello Atul Chitale,

entry.title: Re: Reverse UD of Material having Serial number profile
entry.content: Hello Atul Chitale, did you get any response from SAP, we have a similar issue for one my clients.If yes, can you please update

entry.title: Handling SFC Status "Open" in SAP DM despite "Technically Completed" in ERP
entry.content:
Hello DM Experts,

As the "technically completed" status in the order header from the ERP does not apply in the DM, the issue arises that a SFC with the status "Open" can still be processed in the DM.

How can it be ensured that the SFC is also "technically completed" so that no further processing (e.g. quantity or time confirmations) is possible?

Best regards

Gizem

entry.title: Re: Join tables vbak and konv
entry.content: It is a cluster table, using a JOIN does not work, but FAE does. The problem is the output of the it_tab.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM Integration with ServiceNow
entry.content:
Hi,

We are in process of configuring SAP Cloud ALM integration with ServiceNow. This is new integration, so we request you to please share if there is existing SAP Cloud ALM Integration with ServiceNow step by step guide or any reference document which can help us smooth integration.

Thanks,

 

 

 

Thanks and regards,

 

Kunal PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Integration with ServiceNow
entry.content:
KBA 3336953 outlines detailed information about integrating SAP Cloud ALM with general external ticketing softwares.

Specific to ServiceNow, the Integration with External Ticket Systems page on the SAP Cloud ALM for Operations Expert Portal has a step by step set of instructions for integrating with ServiceNow. Refer to the following sections in the page:

  • Example ServiceNow: Integration
  • Example ServiceNow: Mapping
  • Example ServiceNow: Configure Event Reactions

entry.title: Unlocking Business Process Potential with SAP Signavio Process Insights, Discovery Edition
entry.content:
Just want a crisp summary?
Read the abstract below in italics:

We examines two distinct approaches for business process analysis and improvement within the SAP ecosystem 

  • Business Process Improvement for SAP Solutions (SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition) –For rapidly identifying and addressing high-level process inefficiencies and providing guiding improvements, based on Process Performance Indicators (PPIs).
  • Process Mining (SAP Signavio Process Intelligence or Process Mining by Celonis) – A data-driven, algorithmic approach to reconstruct and analyze real-world business processes using event logs.

The goal of this blog is to evaluate these approaches in terms of prerequisites, effort, cost, functionality, and applicability, determining their potential complementary.

Table of Comparison
The approaches are compared using specific criteria:

Criteria

SAP Business Process Improvement
(Signavio Process Insights)

Process Mining
(SAP Signavio Process Intelligence or Process Mining by Celonis)

Prerequisites

Requires SAP system access

Requires detailed event logs, ETL processes, and significant data preparation

Effort & Time

Lower initial setup, quick insights (minutes)

Higher setup complexity (months) and deeper insights

Cost

Free (discovery edition) or minimal licensing cost

High licensing costs

Functionality

High-level disagnosis,  predefined recommendations for recurring  issues

Deep dive into process deviations and complex scenarios, involving multiple solutions

Objectivity

Relies on predefined Process Performance Indicators, and user interpretation (or deeper analysis via process mining)

Algorithm-driven, objective insights from data

Use cases

Best to identify improvement opportunities across broad processes running on an SAP system

Ideal for analyzing critical or complex processes spanning on multiple solutions in depth

At the opposite to SAP Signavio Process Insights, SAP Signavio Process Intelligence is fully custumizable and editor/system agnostic.


Conclusion and Recommendations

Complementary Usage:

  • SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition is recommended for rapid diagnosis and as a starting point for process improvement
  • Process mining is better suited for deeper investigations, especially in critical processes with substantial improvement potential.

Practical Implications:

  • SAP Signavio Process Insights identifies “where” to focus improvement efforts, while Process Mining answers “why” and “how” for detailed optimization.
  • Combining both approaches allows organizations to leverage the strengths of each. To assist with this,  you can leverage the Plug and Gain approach.

 -----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Detailed blog:

In an era where process efficiency determines competitive edge, businesses are leaning heavily on digital solutions to analyze and optimize their workflows. The free-of-charge SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition, is a solution crafted to analyze process performance within SAP ERP systems, enabling organizations to pinpoint inefficiencies and seize improvement opportunities. While process mining tools like Process Mining by Celonis and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence revolutionize business process analysis, SAP Signavio Process Insights offers a unique approach tailored for rapid insights and actionable outcomes, particularly within the SAP landscape.

Let’s dive into the value this solution offers, its unique differentiators, and how it complements—or diverges from—the broader field of process mining.

 

The Value of SAP Signavio Process Insights

1. Swift, Insight-Driven Analysis

SAP Signavio Process Insights enables organizations to quickly gain visibility into how their business processes are performing. Its built-in capability to analyze operational data within SAP ERP makes it accessible to users without requiring extensive setup or expertise. The discovery edition provides key metrics and identifies inefficiencies in areas such as order-to-cash or procure-to-pay processes, delivering a clear roadmap for improvement.

You can read more about SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition on this page


2. Accelerating Transformation Initiatives

The solution serves as a foundational tool for businesses embarking on transformation journeys. By identifying bottlenecks, unnecessary manual tasks, and deviations from best practices, it sets the stage for deeper optimization projects. Organizations can address low-hanging fruits to realize quick wins, which is critical for maintaining momentum in transformation initiatives.

Finally, the solution provides contextually relevant suggestions for resolution (correction recommendations) and innovation recommendations.


3. Ease of Use and Cost Efficiency

Unlike many advanced tools that require substantial financial and resource investments, the discovery edition is free -for every SAP maintenance customers-. It allows businesses to gain process insights without the need for additional infrastructure investments, making it particularly valuable for organizations seeking to maximize ROI on existing systems.

 

Differentiating SAP Signavio Process Insights from Process Mining

While SAP Signavio Process Insights and process mining both aim to improve business process outcomes, they do so through fundamentally different methodologies and focus areas. Let’s explore these differences.

 

1. Breadth vs. Depth

Process mining tools, such as Celonis and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, excel in granular, data-driven process exploration. They rely on event logs extracted from various systems, enabling a detailed reconstruction of process flows. This level of depth makes them ideal for diagnosing complex issues and optimizing critical business processes at a microscopic level.

SAP Signavio Process Insights, in contrast, is designed for speed and accessibility. Its focus is on providing a high-level analysis of process performance across SAP ERP systems, surfacing key improvement areas without delving into the intricate details of process variations or individual case analyses. This makes it a perfect starting point for businesses looking to identify where to focus their improvement efforts.

 

2. Implementation Complexity

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, Celonis and other process mining tools often require significant effort to extract, transform, and load (ETL) data from disparate systems. These steps, combined with the need to create tailored data models, can make process mining a resource-intensive endeavor.

SAP Signavio Process Insights bypasses this complexity by working directly with existing SAP ERP configurations. It leverages pre-defined process content and KPIs, eliminating the need for complex data preparation while ensuring results are immediately actionable.

But what if you wish to get the best of both worlds (fast and deep insights) in an easy way?
For this, you can leverage the Plug and Gain approach.
We will briefly touch base on it below.

 

3. Use Cases: Quick Diagnosis vs. Comprehensive Analysis

SAP Signavio Process Insights is designed to identify systemic inefficiencies and improvement opportunities rapidly. For example, if an organization faces delays in procurement approvals, the solution highlights this issue and provides contextually relevant suggestions for resolution.

Process mining tools shine when there’s a need for comprehensive root-cause analysis or when investigating non-linear process flows. They uncover insights such as rework loops, compliance violations, and performance deviations across multiple systems, making them indispensable for highly complex and high-stakes processes.

 

4. Complementary Potential

Rather than viewing SAP Signavio Process Insights and process mining as competing solutions, businesses should consider how these tools can complement each other. SAP Signavio Process Insights is the perfect tool for identifying where process mining can provide the most value. For instance, businesses can use SAP Signavio Process Insights to identify critical bottlenecks and then employ SAP Signavio Process Intelligence to perform a deep dive into these areas, uncovering root causes and designing precise interventions.

This is where Plug and Gain comes into play.
In a nutshell, this approach uses scripts to convert data extracted by SAP Signavio Process Insights into event logs, that can be consumed by SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

It can provides several complementary out-of-box content:

  • The Process Landscape: to understand the current process executions and performance across all E2E-processes. Identify areas with improvement potential, in particular transformation related
  • Advance Packages on an End-to-end Process: In-depth analysis of a dedicated process in questions related to transformation and continuous improvement. 8 end-to-end processes are currently available.

This approach is free, but requires access to both solutions (SAP Signavio Process Insights and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence).
You can learn more about Plug and gain here and you can get started here.

 

Why Choose SAP Signavio Process Insights, Discovery Edition?

For businesses running SAP ERP, the discovery edition of SAP Signavio Process Insights is a game-changer. Its pre-integrated setup ensures a seamless experience, and its focus on rapid insights aligns with today’s fast-paced business demands. Here’s why you should consider adopting this tool:

  • Ease of Adoption: No need for custom configurations or integrations
  • Immediate Value: Gain actionable insights into process performance without additional cost
  • Bridge to Deeper Analysis: Use it as a gateway to identify areas that warrant further investigation with advanced tools like SAP Signavio Process Intelligence levaring the Plug and Gain approach.


Closing Thoughts

SAP Signavio Process Insights, discovery edition, underscores SAP’s commitment to making process improvement accessible to all. It empowers organizations to take their first steps toward process excellence with minimal investment and effort. While tools like Celonis Process Mining and SAP Signavio Process Intelligence remain unparalleled for in-depth process exploration, SAP Signavio Process Insights offers an unbeatable combination of simplicity, speed, and scalability.

As businesses strive for greater efficiency, the ability to rapidly uncover improvement areas while leveraging existing systems is invaluable. By integrating SAP Signavio Process Insights into their process optimization toolkit, organizations can ensure they are equipped to thrive in today’s dynamic business landscape.

Let the journey to process excellence begin!

entry.title: Re: Account determination for interests posting in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

Hope you are doing fine!

As this is a business question related to Finance, I've added the tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance to help you to engage with the best experts to support you on this topic.

Best regards,

Kelly

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: "That's why I set bin quantities." - Remember I ask to check what you see for physical stock and available stock? When you check available stock, how many different GR or Expiration Dates do you see there? I guess only one? So how is that supposed to work?

entry.title: Re: Steps to navigate to a canvas/custom page in List Report application
entry.content: Facing the same issue

entry.title: Re: SAP crystal reports for visual studio 2019
entry.content:
Add this page to your Favourites:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

On that page is a link to download as well as the Licensing info:

Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Licensing

Quick answer is you only need to purchase a Copy of Crystal Reports Designer per user developing your app.

https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/crystal-reports.html

So yes it is free as long as your app is not hosted on a Server or Hosting Site. See page 5 on the Licensing doc.

See this blog I wrote for upgrading, it has other info that helps also:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

Note there are 2 installers (EXE), one for VS 2010->2019 (32bit) and one for VS 2022 (64bit) use the 32 bit for VS 2019. You have the correct one.

FYI, 32 bit is going away, SAP highly recommends you move to 64 bit platform:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354088411.html

(**) 32bit CR .NET Runtime will be discontinued after Dec 2025. Move to 64bit CR .NET Runtime ASAP.

You can build your distribution installer using one of the other MSI's, Zip (MSI) or Merge Module, EXE installs look for VS install and for DEV PC's only. And no you cannot manually distribute CR runtime, one of the deployment packages only, to many Registry keys and COM Dll's that need to be registered and no documentation on what they are.

I suggest moving to VS 2022 or when you build your app set it to x64 and not AnyCPU. CR runtime is for your app platform and not the OS.

On the link above there is more info for you also:

Related Documents

Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Licensing

Getting started and moving ahead with Crystal Reports .NET applications

See this Blog for instructions upgrading your existing project to the latest SP

See this blog on how to use CR 2020 Export to XLXS page formats:

How to use the new CR 2020 export to Microsoft Excel(XLXS) in Visual Studio .NET code (new)

how-to-parameters-in-crystal-reports-for-visual-studio-net

Printing Crystal Reports in .NET

SAP Crystal Reports for Visual Studio Installation Guide ( SP 21 and above)

Hope that helps

Don

entry.title: Re: Delta processing inside SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello @GabTan ,

the problem is, that we can not use Delta Capture activated local Table as target in DataFlow to extract data directly from source system via remote table. To use Delta Capture activated local Table as target you have to use Transformation Flow, but if you have remote table as data source you can not use Transformation Flow to extract data from source system. 🙄

That is the reason why I have written this blog and hope that SAP will provide us the solution for this issue. The other option would be, to use Delta capable ABAP CDS View in combination with Replication Flow to get the data per Delta into SAP Datasphere and after that to process the delta records in SAp Datasphere using Transformation Flow.

Best regards

Wanda Soetomo

entry.title: Re: Where are my blogs I have linkedin my IDs and now wha...
entry.content: I have sent an email what is the next step now?

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content: You need to encrypt the password so that it can no longer be read by humans, what don't you understand?

entry.title: Re: Join tables vbak and konv
entry.content:
In that case you should replace move-corresponding to loop. The variant could be as below

  SELECT vkorg, vbeln, erdat, vtweg, kalsm, knumv
    FROM vbak
    INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @IT_vbak
      WHERE erdat IN @s_date AND
            vkorg IN @s_vkorg AND
            vtweg IN @s_vtweg AND
            vbeln IN @s_vbeln
      .

  IF it_vbak IS NOT INITIAL. " for FAE is obligatory
    SELECT knumv, kposn, stunr, kschl, kdatu, kherk, kinak
      FROM konv
      FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @IT_vbak
      WHERE knumv = @IT_vbak-knumv AND
            kdatu IN @s_kdatu AND
            kposn IN @s_kposn AND
            stunr IN @s_stunr AND
            kschl IN @s_kschl AND
            kherk IN @s_kherk AND
            kinak IN @s_kinak
      INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE @IT_konv
      .

  ENDIF.

  " MOVE-CORRESPONDING it_vbak TO it_tab.
  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_vbak> TYPE ty_vbak.
  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_konv> TYPE ty_konv.
  FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_tab_target> TYPE ty_tab.
  LOOP AT it_vbak ASSIGNING <fs_vbak>.
    LOOP AT it_konv ASSIGNING <fs_konv>
        WHERE knumv = <fs_vbak>-knumv.
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO it_tab ASSIGNING <fs_tab_target>.
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_vbak> to <fs_tab_target>.
      MOVE-CORRESPONDING <fs_konv> to <fs_tab_target>.
    ENDLOOP.
  ENDLOOP.

entry.title: SAP CDC Verification Pending Screen returns Permission Denied Error Message
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am working with standard screen set of verification pending , but when i put my email address it say

"403007""Permission denied" error returned after submitting email address on verification pending screen.

Invalid namespace 'accounts' or method 'resendVerificationCode' or you do not have the required permissions to call it.

Do User Need to be logged in before pending verification ?

Many Thanks,

Ruchita

entry.title: Re: Work center-specific production confirmation report
entry.content: CO11N

entry.title: Re: bin determination according to FEFO rule
entry.content: Yes, for available stock, it is managed using a single date. However, for physical stock, it is tracked at the HU (Handling Unit) level. I assume this is non standard and we will need to activate Badi or even more

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud User and Team Provisioning SCIM API Best Practices and Sample Scripts
entry.content:
Dear Juniya @SA54 

In short, you need to enable the administration configuration option 'Ignore Content Namespace For Teams’. For more details please refer to the user guide for my samples and also my related blog https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-scim-api-version-1-and-2-high-level-comparison/ba-p/13578698

Kind regards, Matthew

entry.title: Re: Unable to get Modal Dialog box in SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hi,

It seems to be working as designed.
Though in web that might not be what you expect.

BR, Pekka

entry.title: Re: Create Custom Field F4 Help View using CDS for In App Extension
entry.content:
Thanks for the blog @SamannayaRoy 

The values are shown on the value help thanks to your guidance.

However, we can enter anything different than the value help options. How can we use our CDS view as a check table as well?

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: MDK BAS Version vs Mobile Cloud Build SDK Version
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal Do you know how long it will take approximately for the update to be applied ? Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Display report thumbnail on launchpad 4.3
entry.content: Actually we need to display the content of a dashboard (not just a link to this dahsboard), or even just a part of the information inside the dashboard (for example, juste a table), but it needs to be displayed directly on the launchpad. Is it possible ? Best regards

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Meets TypeScript: A Smooth Migration Journey with Joule
entry.content:
Hi Marian,

Thanks for this detailed feedback and testing, this is very valuable feedback. There is context specific information which is being enriched during the process to convert UI5 controllers implemented in JavaScript to TypeScript. For the decision making, the more details are provided in the code, such as proper namespaces in the arguments and referenced modules in the documentation of the code, the better the results, as this information will be leveraged.

Regarding the version to be installed, the important information should be specified in the ui5.yaml in the framework section (https://sap.github.io/ui5-tooling/v3/pages/Configuration/) this configuration is being used to install the same version of the corresponding types for the installed UI5 version when using /ui5-typescript, falling back to the latest release if not provided as in your case.

We will constantly strive to improve the quality of the provided answers, taking your testing into account, this is very much appreciated.

Thank you & Best Regards

Martin

entry.title: Re: Join tables vbak and konv
entry.content: This worked, thank you very much!

entry.title: Virtual element field displays but is duplicated for every work item
entry.content:
Greetings all, first let me apologize as I am extremely new to ABAP, hence forgive my confusion. I am currently experimenting with an abap class that determines the current approver for work items. I am using virtual elements to determine this field which is displayed in my cds view as follows:

@ObjectModel.readOnly: true
@ObjectModel.virtualElement: true
@ObjectModel.virtualElementCalculatedBy: 'ABAP:Z_TEST_CLASS'
cast('' as abap.sstring( 12 )) as CurrentApprover,

My virtual element displays a current approver in my fiori elements preview, however, the same user is shown for every work item and I am completely stumped as to where I am going wrong. From my understanding the code should work correctly as I have:
 - Used the correct virtual element interfaces and methods
- Specified an internal table of type of my CDS view
- moved it_original-data into my local table
- have specified the fields that are required in my get_calculation_info method

Could anyone provide some insights please, my code is as follows:

CLASS z_test_class DEFINITION
  PUBLIC
  FINAL
  CREATE PUBLIC .

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    INTERFACES if_sadl_exit .
    INTERFACES if_sadl_exit_calc_element_read .

  PROTECTED SECTION.
    TYPES: BEGIN OF Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT,
             ApplicationObjectID TYPE swwflexproc-appl_obj_id,
             ScenarioID          TYPE swwflexproc-scenario_id,
             ScenarioVersion     TYPE swwflexproc-scenario_version,
             WorkItemID          TYPE swwwihead-wi_id,
             CreationDate        TYPE swwwihead-wi_cd,
             CurrentAgent        TYPE swwwihead-wi_aagent,
             Status              TYPE string,
             DaysInInbox         TYPE i,
             Comments            TYPE swwwihead-wi_text,
             CurrentApprover     TYPE string,
           END OF Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA: lt_ihead_table TYPE TABLE OF swwwihead,
          ls_ihead_data  TYPE swwwihead,
          lt_userwi_table TYPE TABLE OF swwuserwi,
          ls_userwi_data TYPE swwuserwi,
          lv_currentapprover TYPE string.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS z_test_class IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD if_sadl_exit_calc_element_read~calculate.
    DATA: lt_calculated_data TYPE TABLE OF Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT,
          ls_calculated_data TYPE Z_SCA_CUSTOM_REPORT.

    " Copy original data to calculated data table
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING it_original_data TO lt_calculated_data.

    LOOP AT lt_calculated_data INTO ls_calculated_data.
      " Load work items that are not completed into table
      SELECT * FROM swwwihead INTO TABLE lt_ihead_table
        WHERE wi_stat <> 'COMPLETED' AND wi_stat <> 'CANCELLED' AND wi_type = 'W'.

      " Check for approvals
      IF lt_ihead_table IS NOT INITIAL.
        SELECT * FROM swwuserwi INTO TABLE lt_userwi_table
          FOR ALL ENTRIES IN lt_ihead_table
          WHERE wi_id = lt_ihead_table-wi_id.

        " Delete unwanted user IDs using a loop
        LOOP AT lt_userwi_table INTO ls_userwi_data.
          IF ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'BGRFC*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'S4H_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'SAP_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'MDG_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'SERV_*' OR
             ls_userwi_data-user_id CP 'BPINST'.
            DELETE lt_userwi_table INDEX sy-tabix.
          ENDIF.
        ENDLOOP.

        LOOP AT lt_ihead_table INTO ls_ihead_data.
          READ TABLE lt_userwi_table INTO ls_userwi_data WITH KEY wi_id = ls_ihead_data-wi_id.
          IF sy-subrc = 0 AND ls_userwi_data-user_id IS NOT INITIAL.
            lv_currentapprover = ls_userwi_data-user_id.
          ELSE.
            lv_currentapprover = 'No current approver found'.
          ENDIF.

          " Assigning the calculated values to the virtual elements
          ls_calculated_data-currentapprover = lv_currentapprover.
          MODIFY lt_calculated_data FROM ls_calculated_data.
        ENDLOOP.
      ELSE.
        LOOP AT lt_ihead_table INTO ls_ihead_data.
          CONCATENATE 'Awaiting approval by:' ls_ihead_data-wi_aagent INTO lv_currentapprover.
          ls_calculated_data-currentapprover = lv_currentapprover.
          MODIFY lt_calculated_data FROM ls_calculated_data.
        ENDLOOP.
      ENDIF.
    ENDLOOP.

    " Return the calculated data
    MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_calculated_data TO ct_calculated_data.
  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD if_sadl_exit_calc_element_read~get_calculation_info.
    IF line_exists( it_requested_calc_elements[ table_line = 'CurrentApprover' ] ).
      APPEND 'wi_id' TO et_requested_orig_elements.
      APPEND 'wi_aagent' TO et_requested_orig_elements.
      APPEND 'user_id' TO et_requested_orig_elements.
    ENDIF.
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report - Database Connector error
entry.content:
According to 2016PAM Cr 2016 is not supported on Windows 11:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/04/3050374d-6a7c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

What redist package are you using?

Note CR for VS SP 37 was just released, it should support Windows 11.

You can enable CR's Database logging component to see if it catches the error:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/1603398

According to CR for VS PAM minimum SP 33 for Windows 11 support:

https://www.sap.com/documents/2016/06/f871031e-757c-0010-82c7-eda71af511fa.html

See my Blog for upgrading your app:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

entry.title: Re: Set Up Integration Suite Trial
entry.content:
Hi, 

It's ok for me now..

I just delete and create again and it works now.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report AR Invoice Service
entry.content: What product are you using? Possibly BusinessOne?

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @graziela  Could you please provide an update on when the IRS Publication 1494 for tax year 2025 Snote will be released to customers?

entry.title: Business Builders: Sustainable Investments
entry.content:
Teach your students to elucidate captivating data-driven stories using visualization techniques to extract insights from business information with HEC Montreal's new gamified experience developed in partnership with SAP.

Business Builders gives educators the opportunity to prepare future leaders for an increasingly complex and data-driven world. Business Builders enables learning data storytelling and visualization with SAP Analytics Cloud.

Business Builders is FREE for the academic community.

The Sustainability Portfolio Scenario assesses a stock portfolio's alignment with ESG goals using CSA. It identifies stocks to remove and add based on their sustainability performance, ensuring the rebuilt portfolio aligns with the updated ESG strategy.

Register at Business Builders: Sustainable Investments Tickets, Tue, Dec 10, 2024 at 1:00 PM | Eventbrite and mark your calendars and save the date for this webinar!

entry.title: Re: Datasphere CLI - Create Object with --input and node.js
entry.content:
@Björn_K, your code is almost correct. If you want to directly in js code insert CSN definition - then first create a constant like:

const TableCSN = {
	definitions: {
		T3: {
			kind: "entity",
			"@EndUserText.label": "T3",
			"@ObjectModel.modelingPattern": {
				"#": "DATA_STRUCTURE",
			},
			"@ObjectModel.supportedCapabilities": [
				{
					"#": "DATA_STRUCTURE",
				},
			],
			elements: {
				ID: {
					"@EndUserText.label": "ID",
					type: "cds.String",
					length: 100,
					key: true,
					notNull: true,
				},
				Name: {
					"@EndUserText.label": "Name",
					type: "cds.String",
					length: 100,
				},
			},
		},
	},
};

 then change input to:

"--input": JSON.stringify(TableCSN),

That worked for me.

One more thing - you are using passcode for login and in your case it is empty  - I guess it is empty just for the post purpose, as in reality it is to be populated. Anyway  please make sure you are really logged in, e.g. but executing in terminal:

datasphere spaces list --host <HOST_NAME>

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud SDK: How to setup requests using the busine...
entry.content:
Thanks for pointing me to the right direction, it worked!

In case anyone else is interested:
I used @SAP-cloud-sdk/connectivity to retrieve the JWT (with the function retriveJwt), see https://sap.github.io/cloud-sdk/docs/js/features/connectivity/destinations.

Just provide the request as parameter to that function [let retrievedJwt = retriveJwt(request)] and you should get the JWT, which you then can pass on to the execute request of the API (providing both the destination name and the jwt). This way the call is getting made with the business user logged on in the frontend application. You also need to make sure that you have a communication arrangement for the given API.

entry.title: Excel Add-in SSO login issue with script error
entry.content:
Hello,

We have implemented MFA for our ByDesign system and the SSO login works fine with Test system for browser and excel add-in. For production system works fine with browser but excel add-in throws script error. 

We reached SAP via incident and it seems the browser setting needs to be changed and to work with our internal IT but we need to know which setting need to be changed. 

Also it works fine with our personal machine. Does anybody can help or faced this kind of problem ?

 

Thanks, 

Madhan

entry.title: Re: Steps to navigate to a canvas/custom page in List Report application
entry.content:
@PoojaPrakashAgr @motiononme1 @15praveenchandrasekar 

In Component.js file of flightcrud.comp2, add the init function as shown below. 

 

 

 

init: function() {
                ReuseComponentSupport.mixInto(this, "component");
                (UIComponent.prototype.init || jQuery.noop).apply(this, arguments);
            }

 

 

 

 Reference links:

  • Developing Reuse Components 

  • sap.suite.ui.generic.template.extensionAPI.ReuseComponentSupport.mixInto

entry.title: Re: Juridiction code Issue
entry.content:
Hi 

several jurisdiction codes have been determined from the address. In NO_DIALOG mode however, a jurisdiction code cannot be selected from a dialog box.

You need to maintain table t001c with below data :

ARBGB = TAX_TXJCD

MSGNR = 100

UNAME = space / your user name 

MSGTS = W

MSGTB = W 

Once you do this , message will be suppressed and tax jurisdiction code will be populated.

entry.title: SAP Commerce Cloud Continuous Influence - Results of 11/2024 Review Cycle
entry.content:
SAP Commerce Cloud has completed the fourth review of Improvement Requests since opening the SAP Continuous Influence sessions in Q4, 2022. To date, we have received 217 Improvement Requests and more than 1000 votes across all session. We highly appreciate the active participation from customers and partners who contribute. Your requests, detailed description of use cases, and votes gives us an unique opportunity to connect with you at scale and use your input to prioritise and scope deliverables.

We have evaluated the top voted requests and also some requests with lower votes that we frequently hear through other feedback channels, such as Customer Technology Advisory Boards (CTABs), customer user groups, customer co-innovation, partner feedback and interactions with colleagues in the field, to mention just a few.

Below is a list of the 4 Continuous Influence Sessions for SAP Commerce Cloud with links to the results blog providing a list of requests based on the following status updates:

    • have been delivered (7) or are already offered (6)
    • have been moved forward in the product planning process (accepted (3) / planned long-term (3))
    • have not (yet) made it into product planning, since further evaluation may be required (for long-term consideration (3))
    • were not accepted for planning (not planned (7))

 

Session Name & LinkDescriptionResults Blog (all contain the same content)
SAP Commerce Cloud AutomationFor technical users operating SAP Commerce Cloud instanceshttps://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3587 
SAP Commerce Cloud Developer ExperienceFor technical users customising SAP Commerce Cloudhttps://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3590
SAP Commerce Cloud Pre-built IntegrationsFor technical users integrating SAP Commerce Cloud with other SAP solutionshttps://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3589 
SAP Commerce Cloud Business FeaturesFor business (and technical) users with requests related to business capabilities of SAP Commerce Cloud https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/blog/3588 


Below is a list of blog posts with results from former Review Cycles for SAP Commerce Cloud Continuous Influence:

    • Results of 06/2024 Review Cycle
    • Results of 11/2023 Review Cycle
    • Results of 06/2023 Review Cycle

Please see this blog post if you have not yet registered for and accessed the SAP Commerce Cloud Influence Sessions and would like to learn more.

We look forward to hearing more from and from more of you in the future!

entry.title: Re: How to configure ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud

entry.content: just debug it. not just looking at the code.

Manage mass maintanance - uploaded excel

Hi all,

last year we run mass maintenance through app Manage Mass Maintenance - Products.

Job was successful, but i would like to ask if it is possible to download or get excel which was uploaded in.

I tried to check this process, but i see nowhere possibility to download this excel.

Thank you for your advices,

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report - Database Connector error
entry.content:
Thanks for the reply.
I use CR16 (SP8)  on windows10 and I have no problems
The problem is on 2 pc with Windows 11 of our customers and

the strange thing is that on many other PCs with Windows 11, we do not encounter problems

I use OleDB driver for MSSql on report. 
Can you tell me where I can download the redist pack for windows11?

Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP CICD pileplie for SAP JAVA
entry.content: Please check following official SAP documentation:: Consume Azure Services in SAP BTP

entry.title: Issue with Unrestricted Stock Popup in Adaptation Editor for App "Manage Stock" (F106, F1062) in SAP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am encountering an issue with the "Manage Stock" application (F106, F1062) when using the Adaptation Editor in SAP Business Application Studio (SAP BAS).

The issue is as follows:

When I open the application via the Adaptation Editor in SAP BAS, the Unrestricted Stock Popup (refer to the attached screenshot) does not open. Hence, I cannot access the controls to make modifications.


However, when I open the same application directly from the Fiori Launchpad, the popup works perfectly, and I am able to interact with it as expected.

 


I have ensured the following:

The app works fine in the Launchpad.
There are no apparent errors in the browser console or network logs in SAP BAS.
All necessary roles and authorizations are in place.
Could anyone provide insights into why this issue might occur specifically in the Adaptation Editor and how to resolve it?

 

#Sapfiori #BASAdaptationProject #Logistics #ManageStock

entry.title: Re: CIM not able to determine Invoicing Party (Central Invoice Management)
entry.content: Hi everyone, I face the same problem as fathd. The supplier list is not refreshing even after doing a full import again. Any ideas?

entry.title: How to trigger email notification when Benefits End Date is changed?
entry.content: Is there a way for us to trigger an email notification or alert when the Benefits End Date of a terminated employee is changed? PS. The recipients of this email/alert are active employees.

entry.title: R visualization console shows PCRE JIT compilation errors claiming no more memory
entry.content:
Hi!

I have hosted Rserve on a Google Cloud VM instance with CentOS system. I have connected it to SAP Analytics Cloud successfully (TLS and all working), but I keep getting errors when trying to work with R visualizations.

The errors I tend to get are as follows:


Warning in grep("^[[:alpha:]]{2}_", x[1L], perl = TRUE) :PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

Warning in FUN(X[[i]], ...) : PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

Warning in strsplit(x, " [ ]* ", perl = TRUE) : PCRE JIT compilation error 'no more memory'

I have tried debugging this by also just disabling PCRE JIT compiler in Renviron but it didn't seem to work. I have found very little information on this error, basically nothing from Rstudio community or R documentation. I have noticed that more than a decade ago this error was prevalent in some php systems but nothing on R or SAC. I did also increase memory allocations/limits for Rserve but didn't seem to be the cause of this error.

entry.title: SAC - Measure Column Script in onActive Function
entry.content:
Hi, 

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud.

I created a measure column in the story (counting a dimension). I want to filter my table using this measure column but I want to do it in the script.

We can filter the dimension column by writing: Top_Table.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Dimension_Column_Name",{value: "XX"}):;

Can we filter the measure column in script?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: move bank account to new company code
entry.content: I found the solution by experimenting. We had to close bank account in old company, then update configuration for the bank account and it got opened in new company. we manually transfer opening balance from old company to new company using intercompany clearing accounts

entry.title: Re: New B2B electronic invoicing law in Germany: What you need to know
entry.content:
Dear Monika,

talking about S/4HANA public edition: for both versions you've mentioned,

  • integrated via CIM or
  • mass upload (directly in S/4 public without CIM?),

it is necessary to license SAP DRC, cloud edition, right?

Thanks & regards

Wolfgang

entry.title: Extension while delivery creation to change item weights and dimensions before route determination
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we are using S/4HANA and have to change weights and dimensions for our configured products on item level while creating deliveries. As different weights may impact route determination, we cannot use most common user exits (Include MV50AFZ1 or BAdI LE_SHP_DELIVERY_PROC) because route has already been determinated when processing them.

Therefore we need an extension where to change item data BEFORE route is determined.

Can anyone help?

Kind regards
Peter Schmidt

entry.title: Re: Adobe form XML parsing error due to invalid characters
entry.content: Big thanks for the post, very helpful!

entry.title: Tax recorded in entity where the vendor is not where the expense is.
entry.content:
we have a situation where we use one company and the bank account to pay vendors so all the invoices are recorded to this company with vendor in that company as well. however the debit is coded to the company it is for, in this case, the tax calculated is recorded in the company where the vendor is whereas we want it to be recorded where the expense is so is there a configuration to achieve that or another way to reclass the taxes.

 

Current situation entries are like below

Cocode1 Vendor  Credit
Cocode1 Tax        debit
Cocode1 Interco   Debit

Cocode2  Expense Debit
CoCode2  Interco   Credit


What we will like is the tax line to be in the Cocode2

entry.title: Standard change RFC auto status update once standard change moved to import into production state
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have implemented standard change in our CHARM and solman version is 7.2 sp 9. 

At the being implemented state of request for change standard change is getting created, Now we want a configuration that will mark parent request for change to confirmed state when a standard change is moved to imported into production state. Our standard change transaction type is ZMSG and RFC transaction type is YZCR.

 

 

 

Regards,

Saikat

#SOLMAN Change Control Management   @Richard_Büffing

entry.title: Re: Is FSCM available in SAP Public cloud?
entry.content:
Hello,

Yes, it's also supported.

Please check link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/811174d486d74c709469ef3d36f9b7bb.html

Best Regards,
Owen

entry.title: Re: AGGREGATION ON CDS VIEW and Filtering data with where clause issue
entry.content:
tried both ways, select query fetch from CDS1 and join CDS2 and vice versa.

as below:

Define view ZCDS1
as select distinct from mard
{
key matnr,
key werks,
key lgort,
labst
}

Define view ZCDS2

as select from ZCDS1

{
key matnr,
sum(labst) as stock
} group by matnr

Program:
From previous fetch, we have combination of matnr,werks stored in ITAB. 

s_lgort selection screen.

select ZCDS1~matnr
          ZCDS2~stock
from ZCDS1
inner join ZCDS2 on ZCDS2~matnr = ZCDS1~matnr
for all entries in @ITAB where ZCDS1~matnr = @ITAB-matnr
                                         and ZCDS1~werks = @ITAB-WERKS
                                         and ZCDS1~lgort in @s_lgort
into table @DATA(lt_stock).

entry.title: CDS view: Default value in selection screen field with excluding value
entry.content:
Developed Fiori Element based App with selection screen field as Status. I need to populate default value in selection with NE 'X'.

I tited  @Consumption.filter :{ multipleSelections: true, selectionType: #RANGE, defaultValue: 'X' } which is having only Equal option.

Please suggest. Thanks for your time

entry.title: Re: Form data option not working in SAP CPI but working in POSTMAN - 404 Error
entry.content: Yes, it is working for other create and update on JIRA. So, I am passing the token and authentication wise it is fine.

entry.title: SAC - Disable global filter on charts
entry.content:
Hello,

I create stories by connecting to HANA with live connection in SAP Analytics Cloud. I have tables, numeric cards, line graphs on different pages in my story. In order to use my Month filter actively on every page and chart, I created a Calendar Model that I can link to all tables. So there are months in it and I linked it with the month column of each table. In short, I linked my Calendar Dimension to other FACT tables.

I created a common Page Filter that I can filter on each page. So when I select a month, I see the data of that month on each page. However, I want to do the following: Show 2 years of data outside of Numeric Cards, but show selected data on all numeric cards.

I guess I can summarize it like this: Is there an option to turn off a chart to filters so that the filters don't affect it? Line charts should not be affected by the selected global month filter.

Thank you

entry.title: Material Part number enhancement
entry.content:
Hi Team

Could you let us know the feasibility of adding MATERIAL PART NUMBER field/column to SUPPLIER INVOICE LIST app and in the Backend transaction MIRO?

In the Supplier Invoices List App, under the Purchase Document Reference tab, the requirement is to add a new column for the Manufacturer Part Number next to the Material Number (MATNR). This column should display the MFRPN (Manufacturer Part Number) corresponding to each Material Number. The Part Number fetched from MARA table, where the MATNR is matched with the appropriate MFRPN field. 

Thanks & Regards

entry.title: Re: Early lot creation by product
entry.content: I cannot read where this was mentioned. Could you please repeat it?

entry.title: DTR- Default Route is not triggered in FU
entry.content:
Hi

In the outbound delivery, the route is automatically determined, but after saving the outbound delivery, the system generates the Freight Unit (FU) document. However, when I open the "Edit Freight Unit" app, the route is not displayed. It showing empty is Default Route field.

Regards,

Kumar

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Power Automate and Business ByDesign Supplier Invoice scanning
entry.content:
Hi John,

Can you please elaborate more on how IRPA or BPA can help in automating the process....currently we are not able to use SAP collaboration window hence trying for another option.....

TIA

entry.title: Manage Withholding Tax Items app is not found
entry.content:
Manage Withholding Tax Items app (App ID F5428) is not found event the business catalog and business role is assigned

I need to use Manage Withholding Tax Items app, so I have assigned the business catalog SAP_FIN_BC_MWTI_COMMON_PC to role for user.

After I have done managing the business catalog and business role, I still cannot see the app. Please help to investigate.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Manage Withholding Tax Items app is not found
entry.content:
The app Manage Withholding Tax Items is not a standalone application and doesn't have a separate tile, so it won't appear in search results, and this is standard behavior. It is accessible from the app Run Statutory Reports.

See kba 3503880 No app Manage Withholding Tax Items in search result

entry.title: Re: The Procurement Monthly - December 2024
entry.content: Thanks again @GordonDonovan

entry.title: Re: Would like to obtain the PTO's and job aids?
entry.content: New link https://dam.sap.com/mac/app/p/pdf/asset/preview/MqoPXdx?ltr=a&rc=10

entry.title: Re: SAP SEGW OData project with CDS Reference - Chance to...
entry.content:
just redefine it in your z segw project.

this should help you.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/how-to-redefine-rds-based-odata-services/ba-p/13527155

entry.title: Any object to change prices of shipping costs? (ie a BAPI for VI02)
entry.content:
It seems we are a lot different of almost every company in this world (and some of the others) and we cannot use the automatic calculation of shipping costs.

So, I need to create the cost with each subitem's conditions customized.

I've been looking around (and in other places) for things like "BAPI VI01" "FM VI02" "shipping cost change" and any other query string that I've been able to think of with no success.

The most nearly approach I found is a post here with a lot of calls to SD_SCD* function modules, and it seems even more complicated than the batch input I have in mind (in which I must control different tabs, stripes, positions without positioning buttons, etc).

Has anyone found a better approach?
(and no, to win the lottery and leave my position is not an option)

entry.title: Re: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various app...
entry.content: Hello HakanHaslaman thanks for your response If I have made sure that the names of the clients are completely identical, I have also made sure that for each client the scope is reflected. As a comment, if you test each client individually everything works perfectly, however, when I add more than one client in grant-as-authority-to-apps this does not work and returns a 401 unauthorized for each referenced client. The last part you mention causes me a little doubt, in the blog I base they never comment that the clients' uaa must be linked to my application and/or srv This must be necessary, that it be bound to both the app and the srv?

entry.title: Can time pairs be split across midnight in SuccessFactors Time?
entry.content:
We have employees that start a shift on one day and work through to the next day. Our current time system allows us to split the time pairs so that employees are credited for the hours worked on the actual calendar day. This is mainly important for the end of the pay week and for calculating hours worked on holidays for holiday premium pay. 

Scenario: Punch In - 12/9/2024 10:00PM  Punch Out 12/10/2024 6:00AM

Our current system will credit the employee for two hours on 12/9/2024 and 6 hours on 12/10/2024.

Is this possible using SuccessFactors Time?

entry.title: Re: How to configure ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud
entry.content:
Hi @harish_dahima,

no, this is currently not possible.

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: Outbound SMS / WhatsApp Message from SAP Service Cloud
entry.content: Hello I have the similar question how did you call the Twilio API to send the message from SAP C4C and our middleware is PI

entry.title: Re: Synchronization of GL accounts to CIM seems incomplete
entry.content:
Found a pointer here https://me.sap.com/notes/3491849 there is a hard coded (!) filter that doesn't show in the log. 
Unfortunately, this turns the problem around. Now I have more accounts in CIM than are sent out of S/4.

entry.title: Re: Dimension Description Text Options
entry.content: I thought about it but then I could not hide the original ID/Description of the dimension in a table. Is there a way to do that?

entry.title: Re: How to manage table and report password fields
entry.content:
Hi @raymond_giuseppi 

where do I insert that html code?

In SE16 i see the auth_client_secret i clear text

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 Meets TypeScript: A Smooth Migration Journey with Joule
entry.content:
@martinhaeuser 
Thank you for your response.
I am basically convinced that it can be very helpful.
I can understand that you get the information from the yaml file, but if I create a freestyle app with the Fiori tools (as I have done here), this information is not in the yaml by default, but comes from the manifest.json.
This is not a special way at all, but should definitely be taken into account.
Thank you for your work!
Marian

entry.title: SAP Retail : Merchandise & Article Hierarchies Key Points to consider
entry.content:
SAP Retail: Merchandise Hierarchy vs. Article Hierarchy

In the SAP Retail solution, two key hierarchies exist: Merchandise Hierarchy and Article Hierarchy. Each serves distinct purposes, but confusion often arises during implementation when their roles are not clearly defined. This can lead to redundancy or over-complication in hierarchies, hampering efficiency.

  1. Merchandise Hierarchy

Purpose:

Focused on internal processes, the Merchandise Hierarchy organizes goods for procurement, pricing, and inventory management. It aligns with the merchant’s perspective to manage purchasing, vendor interactions, and promotions.

Key Features:

  • Articles are grouped by shared characteristics, e.g., Apparel → Men's Apparel → Dress Shirt → Slim Fit.
  • Attributes such as color, size, and brand are maintained at the article master level.
  • Articles are assigned to one node at the lowest level of the hierarchy.
  • Useful for:
    • Condition records and mass maintenance.
    • Procurement-focused planning and analytics.
    • Defining assortments and streamlining listing processes.

Best Practices:

  • Use GS1 standards (e.g., Segment → Family → Class → Brick → Attribute).
  • Avoid creating overly complex hierarchies to fit both procurement and sales needs.
  1. Article Hierarchy

Purpose:

Customer-focused, the Article Hierarchy reflects how consumers make purchasing decisions, often modeled as a Consumer Decision Tree (CDT).

Key Features:

  • Articles can belong to multiple hierarchies, with time-dependent structures.
  • Designed for sales analytics, profitability analysis, and retail planning.
  • Example: Men's Dress Shirt → Slim Fit → No Iron → White → Size (matching consumer search behavior).

Best Practices:

  • Maintain the hierarchy at the client level to standardize across distribution chains.
  • Limit to 5-6 levels to prevent performance issues.
  • Avoid frequent changes to maintain historical data integrity for reporting.

Practical Example

For a Shirt, the Merchandise Hierarchy might classify it as:
Apparel → Men’s Apparel → Dress Shirt → Slim Fit, with attributes like color, size, and brand.

The Article Hierarchy, however, aligns with a consumer perspective:
Men’s Dress Shirt → Slim Fit → No Iron → White → Size, catering to how customers search and shop.

Key Considerations

  1. Separate Focus: Merchandise Hierarchy is procurement-centric, while Article Hierarchy is consumer-centric.
  2. Avoid Overlap: Do not attempt to merge requirements into one hierarchy to prevent unnecessary complexity.
  3. Planning and Reporting: Use Article Hierarchy for sales-driven decisions; Merchandise Hierarchy for purchasing and inventory tasks.
  4. Sustainability: Limit levels to optimize performance and maintain historical data accuracy.
  5. Flexibility: Design Article Hierarchies to adapt to evolving consumer behaviors while keeping Merchandise Hierarchy stable.

By clearly distinguishing the roles of Merchandise and Article Hierarchies, retailers can optimize both internal operations and customer-facing processes. This ensures efficient planning, reporting, and an enhanced consumer experience.

entry.title: Developer in 2024 : which is the best way ?
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm an Abap expert (classic or object etc). I've done 2 upgrade in this position. I know also Fiori free style and a little of Fiori element. 
Now I can influence development approach in several context but I'm a bit confused in what is the good approach to create a Fiori App.

And now you can do : 

for back-end : classic (SEGW), RAP, CAP and also CAP in the cloud
for front-end : Fiori freestyle, Fiori elements, Full-stack with productivity tools, annotations on cds

And I suppose I forgot options. Plus the configuration of the customer : private cloud, on premise... Plus the knowledge of the IT company.

I know I have to progress for CAP but is it the same in back-end and btp.

I'll appreciate any advice.

Christophe

entry.title: Does datasphere work good with ECC or should it be with S4/Hana
entry.content:
Hello

Gurus,

I would like to know that if SAP Datasphere with work fine with ECC 6.0 as far as performance and all the features are concerned or Is it best delivered in when connected with S4/HANA.

We have ECC 6.0 and our roadmap to implement S4 in 2027 but we are trying to do PoC  on Datasphere which is connected with ECC and I am just wondering what are the advantages or pros & cons of datasphere connected with ECC or should we wait for S4 and then implement datasphere.

Thanks for your advice in advance.

Regards

entry.title: Re: SAP CI iFlow exception as noted in SAP Note 3293244 b...
entry.content: Hi, SivaPO. We do not have an exception sub-process at this time. However, we are analyzing options to do so as from other research I've also done this seems like the 'best practice'. Thanks for the tip!

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Modeling Extensions & Integration QRC Q1 2024 Release
entry.content:
Hi @Emmanuel1 ,

There are security concerns regarding the export of Data Access Control information from models.  I would suggest creating an Influence item explaining your use-case for doing this https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/884 .

Best regards,

Amanda

entry.title: Can a custom field be set as mandatory only for New Hire/Rehire process, otherwise optional?
entry.content: We have a new custom field that should be mandatory to fill out during the hire/rehire process, but should not be mandatory for current employees (i.e. when doing a change in job info etc). Can it be set up via a business rule or somehow?

entry.title: Re: API Real Estate Contracts for Public Cloud
entry.content: Hi Jeroen, thank you for your feedback. Unfortunately, there is currently only the workaround to create contracts with contract objects (J4) using the 3-step-approach: (1) create contract with contract object, (2) read the contract object from the created object, (3) create conditions using the contract object number. We are aware that this workaround is uncomfortable and try to improve the use of the API. Best regards, Anja
